mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( mnum, pwd, name, nick, email, verified, mphone, grade, storeaddr, logintype, authority, regdate ) VALUES ( member_seq.NEXTVAL, #{pwd}, #{name}, #{nick}, #{email}, 'N', #{mphone}, 'REGULAR', #{storeaddr}, 'LOCAL', #{authority}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(email) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(nick) FROM member WHERE nick = #{nick}
SELECT mnum, name, nick, email, mphone, grade, storeaddr, authority, regdate FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nick = #{nick}, mphone = #{mphone}, storeaddr = #{storeaddr} WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE member SET grade = 'WITHDRAWN' WHERE mnum = #{mnum}
